<!--
Thank you for your contribution! Please fill out the sections below so reviewers have the
context they need to review your changes quickly.
-->

# Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed. Include a reference to any related issue (e.g. `Fixes #123`).

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore / CI

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the contribution guidelines in [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The PR has a descriptive title and summary.
- [ ] I have added/updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I have run the test suite locally and all tests pass.
- [ ] I have updated documentation where required.
- [ ] I have added an entry to [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) if this change should be recorded.

## How has this been tested?
Describe the steps you took to verify the changes. Provide commands and expected output where helpful.

## Breaking changes
Does this change introduce any breaking API changes? If yes, explain and provide migration steps.

## Related issues / PRs
List any related issues or PRs.

## Reviewer notes
Anything specific reviewers should watch for (edge cases, performance concerns, etc.).
